stories.title: The eight most astounding stats of MLB's season start
stories.summary: It's hard to know which numbers to trust this time of year. Here are the ones that we do -- and don't -- believe in.

stories.title: Early MLB 2026 trade deadline preview: Player most likely to be traded for all 30 teams
stories.summary: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be made available for trades come August.

stories.title: Nuggets on McDaniels' criticism: 'Let them talk'
stories.summary: In response to the Wolves' Jaden McDaniels calling them out for being "bad defenders," the Nuggets on Wednesday said "it's part of the rivalry."

stories.title: Projected lottery pick Acuff declares for NBA draft
stories.summary: Arkansas guard Darius Acuff Jr. announced Wednesday on ESPN's "NBA Today" that he is declaring for the 2026 NBA draft.

stories.title: Cowboys won't talk long-term deal with Pickens
stories.summary: The Cowboys will not discuss a long-term contract with George Pickens and want him to play this season on the franchise tag, executive Stephen Jones said.
